topic: A student discovers their teacher follows them on social media
raw_output:
[story 1]

Maya scrolled through her feed, a small, knowing smirk tugging at the corner of her mouth. She was deep into an afternoon of digital meandering when a notification popped up. It was from Mr. Harrison. Her breath hitched, a sudden, sharp intake of air. She clicked it, her fingers hovering over the screen, a strange lightness spreading through her chest. There, in a recent post, was a slightly blurry photo of the school garden, captioned with a quote about nurturing growth. Maya couldn't help the little chuckle that escaped her. She tapped the profile, a curious warmth blooming in her stomach. It seemed… amusing. She quickly navigated back to her own feed, a mischievous glint in her eyes as she considered what else this meant.

[story 2]

"Oh, come on," Liam muttered to himself, a wide grin stretching across his face as he stared at his phone. He’d just seen a story from Ms. Evans—a candid shot of her sipping tea in her office, looking surprisingly relaxed. He tapped the link to her profile, a feeling of sheer, uncontainable amusement bubbling up inside him. It was a delightful little secret, this shared digital space. He leaned back in his chair, letting out a soft, breathy laugh that sounded a little too loud in the quiet classroom. He was already formulating a ridiculous, yet harmless, comment to leave there.

[story 3]

"Seriously?" Chloe whispered, a delighted tremor running through her voice as she examined her phone. The image was undeniable: a picture of Mr. Davies, looking entirely unburdened, posted to his private account. A slow, buoyant feeling settled over her, making her shoulders relax. She couldn't stop the slight upturn of her lips. It felt like discovering a hidden backstage pass. She quickly typed a short, witty observation, her thumbs moving with an energetic rhythm, eager to see if he’d notice her little gesture. The anticipation made her bounce slightly in her seat.
